references.text: Veldkamp, JF. 1986. Elaeagnaceae. Flora Malesiana series 1, 10: 151-156

species.citation: Roxb. , Fl. Ind. (Carey & Wallich) 1 (1820) 459 ; Roxb., Hort. Beng. (1814) 11, nom. inval., nom. nud.; ‘t Hart & Veldk., Blumea 26 (1980) 398; Veldk., Fl. Males. ser. 1, 10 (1986) 153. = Elaeagnus philippensis Perr. , Mém. Soc. Linn. Paris 3 (1825) 114 ; Merrill, EPFP 3 (1923) 134.
species.distribution: Australia, Philippines, Taiwan. BATAN, BATANES, CALAYAN, CEBU, JOLO, LEYTE, LUZON: Albay, Aurora, Bataan, Benguet, Bulacan, Cagayan, Camarines Sur, Ilocos Norte, La Union, Laguna, Mountain Province, NCR, Nueva Ecija, Nueva Vizcaya, Pampanga, Quezon, Rizal, Sorsogon, MARINDUQUE, MINDANAO: Bukidnon, Misamis Occidental, MINDORO, NEGROS, PALAUI, PALAWAN, PANAY, POLILLO.
species.notes: Throughout Malesia; low and medium elevation forests and thickets. 0-2000(2125)m.
